description_long: This is a stylized doll with a dark brown complexion, large round eyes, and a pink mustache detail on its face. The doll has long, straight, dark brown hair that covers the sides and back of its head. It is dressed in a red and black checkered shirt with long sleeves and blue pants, giving it a casual, urban look. The hands and feet are simplified and rounded, typical of cartoon-like figures. The facial features are minimalistic, with no visible nose and a prominent pink mustache. The overall appearance is playful and designed to appeal to children or as a decorative figure in an urban setting.
description: A cartoonish doll with dark brown skin, long dark hair, a red checkered shirt, blue pants, and a pink mustache detail on its face.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, pink mustache, large eyes, red checkered shirt, and blue pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length and volume of the hair, as well as the profile of the face and outstretched arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head covered by hair, the back of the shirt, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hair's shape, the side of the face, and the arm's position.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a long-sleeve red and black checkered shirt reminiscent of a flannel or lumberjack style, paired with plain blue pants. The outfit is casual and urban, with no visible brand markings or additional embellishments.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended outward to the sides, legs straight and close together, and the head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral facial expression with wide, open eyes and a straight pink mustache. There are no visible eyebrows or mouth curvature to indicate emotion.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight, dark brown hair that covers the sides and back of the head, with a smooth and even texture.
